NO_BOOKING_PERIODS_DESCRIPTION: Create your first booking period to get started with managing time slots and availability.
FORM_FIELD_MIN_NUMBER: Enter a number that is not less than the minimum allowed.
FORM_FIELD_MAX_NUMBER: Enter a number that is not greater than the maximum allowed.
GENERAL_ARE_YOU_SURE: Are you sure you want to proceed with this action?
RESERVATION_PAYMENT_NO_CUSTOMER_EMAIL: Link a customer with an email address to send this message.
RESERVATION_ORDER_OVERVIEW_INVITE_SENT: Order overview link sent to the customer.
RESERVATION_ORDER_OVERVIEW_INVITE_FAILED: Could not send the order overview email.
RESERVATION_PAYMENT_PAYMENT_LINK_FAILED: Could not create or copy the payment link.
GENERAL_CURRENCY_SYMBOL_SPACE_DESC: Add a space between symbol and amount
EMPLOYEE_CARD_NO_SKILLS: This employee has no skills linked yet.
EMPLOYEE_CARD_NO_CERTIFICATES: This employee has no certificates linked yet.
EMPLOYEE_DETAIL_SECTION_INFO_DESCRIPTION: Employee number, name, and contact details shown on lists and bookings.
EMPLOYEE_DETAIL_SECTION_DETAILS_DESCRIPT: Role, work location, employment type, and start date.
EMPLOYEE_DETAIL_SECTION_STATUS_DESCRIPTI: Inactive employees stay in the system but are hidden from scheduling and quick filters.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_INTRO: Link skills this employee has been assessed on. Changes apply when you save the employee.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_TIPS: Use Add skill in each category to open the picker. Removing rows only affects that category.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_SUMMARY_DESCRIPTION: Link skills from your library by category. Use abbreviations and label colors from the skill catalog so planners can scan schedules quickly.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_HOW_TO_TIP_1: Each block is one skill category. Linked skills appear as colored chips; remove a chip to unlink that skill.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_HOW_TO_TIP_2: Use Add skill to open the picker—you can select skills across categories in one go.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_HOW_TO_TIP_3: Links are stored when you save the employee—same as other detail fields.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_FOOTER_NOTE: Removing a skill here only detaches it from this employee; the skill record in the library stays unchanged.
EMPLOYEE_SKILLS_PANEL_EXPAND: Expand for more information about how to link skills to employees
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_INTRO: Link certificates held by this employee. Changes apply when you save the employee.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_TIPS: Use Add certificate in each category to open the picker. Removing rows only affects that category.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_SUMMARY_DESCRIPTIO: Link certificates from your library by category (safety, technical, compliance). Track which qualifications this employee holds for scheduling and compliance checks.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_HOW_TO_TIP_1: Each block is one certificate category. Linked certificates appear as chips; remove a chip to unlink that certificate.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_HOW_TO_TIP_2: Use Add certificate to open the picker—you can select certificates across categories in one go.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_HOW_TO_TIP_3: Links are stored when you save the employee—same as other detail fields.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_FOOTER_NOTE: Removing a certificate here only detaches it from this employee; the certificate record in the library stays unchanged.
EMPLOYEE_CERTIFICATES_PANEL_EXPAND: Expand for more information about how to link certificates to employees
GENERAL_ORDER_BEFORE_TIME_PLACEHOLDER: Enter order before time in hours
ERROR_INVALID_PHONE: Please enter a valid phone number
ERROR_FAILED_TO_FETCH: Failed to load data. Please try again.
GENERAL_MAINTENANCE_DESC: When enabled, the public BBQ donut boat booking page shows a maintenance message and cannot be used for new bookings.
GENERAL_SELECT_ENTITY_DESCRIPTION: Select one or more {entity} from the list below to link them to your main entity.
GENERAL_WARNING_LOGOUT_MESSAGE: You will be logged out. Any unsaved changes may be lost.
GENERAL_WARNING_MESSAGE: Warning, this action cannot be undone!
GENERAL_WARNING_REMOVE_IMAGE: Are you sure you want to remove this image?
GENERAL_WARNING_REMOVE_IMAGE_MESSAGE: This action removes the image from the server and cannot be undone.
GENERAL_WARNING_BULK_DELETE_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items? This action cannot be undone.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_DESCRIPTION: Enter your email address. If an account exists, we will send reset instructions.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: If an account exists for that email, we have sent instructions.
FORGOT_PASSWORD_GENERIC_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
RESET_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: Your password has been updated. You can sign in.
RESET_PASSWORD_INVALID_LINK: This reset link is missing information. Request a new reset email.
RESET_PASSWORD_GENERIC_ERROR: Could not update your password. Check the fields and try again.
USER_PASSWORD_RESET_SECTION_DESCRIPTION: Send this user a secure email with a one-time link to choose a new password. They will not need their current password. The link expires automatically and can only be used once.
USER_PASSWORD_RESET_SECTION_CARD_EXPIRY_: The reset link in the email expires after a short time for security.
USER_PASSWORD_RESET_SECTION_CARD_SECURIT: The full reset link is only sent to this user’s inbox — it is never shown in the admin panel.
USER_PASSWORD_RESET_EMAIL_FAILED: Could not send the password reset email.
LOGOUT_WARNING: Are you sure you want to log out?
TABLE_CONFIGURATION_LOAD_LOCAL_STORAGE_E: Error loading table configuration from local storage
TABLE_CONFIGURATION_RESET_WARNING_MESSAG: Resetting the current table configuration will result in the loss of your current table columns and quick filters.
TABLE_CONFIGURATION_INTRO_BODY: Drag visible columns using the grip to change their order. Toggle column visibility to show or hide them in the table—hidden columns are grouped below. Quick filters expose a column in the filter bar when that column is visible.
INFORMATION_PANEL_CLICK_TO_EXPAND: Click to expand for more details
NO_TIMESLOTS_ASSIGNED: No time slots assigned to this booking period
ERROR_LOADING_BOOKING_PERIOD: Failed to load booking period details
BOOKING_CALENDAR_SELECT_LOCATION: Select a location to view its booking calendar.
BOOKING_CALENDAR_FULLY_BOOKED_BOATS_DAY: No boats left that day (all time slots)
BOOKING_CALENDAR_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load calendar data. Please try again.
BOOKING_CALENDAR_ACTIVITY_BOAT_CAPACITY_: No boats left for this activity in this time slot.
BOOKING_CALENDAR_NO_TIMESLOTS: No timeslots available for this date
BOOKING_CALENDAR_TIMESLOTS_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load timeslots. Please try again.
BOOKING_ADMIN_RESOLVE_BOAT_FAILED: No boat could be assigned for this slot. Try another time or adjust guest count.
BOOKING_STEP_DATE_REQUIRE_PREVIOUS: Select a location and activity first.
BOOKING_DATE_TIMESLOT_PRICE_EXPLANATION_: Green prices on each time slot use the list rate for {adults} adults.
Green prices on each time slot: list rate for {adults} adults, plus €{perChild} per child × {children} (€{surcharge} for all children).
BOOKING_CALENDAR_TIMESLOT_MIN_GUESTS_VAL: This timeslot needs at least {required} guests.
BOOKING_CALENDAR_HOLD_CREATE_ERROR: Failed to create boat hold. Please try again.
RESERVATION_CALENDAR_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load reservations for this month.
RESERVATION_CALENDAR_SELECT_RESERVATION: Select a reservation from the list
ACTIVITY_BOAT_CAPS_SETTINGS_DESC: Limit how many boats can be booked per boat category for each activity on the same time slot (overlapping activities). Leave a field empty for no limit. The same limits can be edited on each activity’s detail page under Boat Caps.
ACTIVITY_BOAT_CAPS_NO_ACTIVITIES: No activities found for this location. Create an activity first.
GENERAL_NO_CATEGORIES_AVAILABLE: No boat categories available for this location.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_NO_ARRANGEMENTS_DES: There are no arrangements available for this location at the moment.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_INCOMPLETE_TOAST: You selected {selected} of {total} arrangements. Please add {missing} more.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_INCOMPLETE_TOAST_MI: You selected {selected} of {total} arrangements. Please add {missing} more.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_NEED_MORE: Please add {missing} more arrangement(s) to proceed. You need {total} arrangements in total (one per guest).
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_NEED_MORE_SINGULAR: Please add {missing} more arrangement to proceed. You need {total} arrangement in total (one per guest).
BOOKING_STEP_ARRANGEMENTS_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load arrangements. Please try again.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_SELECT_X_ARRANGEMEN: Select {count} arrangements in the list below.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_PARTY_MENU_HINT: Choose one adult menu per adult and one child menu per child.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_PARTY_MENU_MISMATCH: Choose one adult menu per adult and one child menu per child.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_PARTY_BUCKET_LIMIT: You cannot add more menus of this type for your party size.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_UNAVAILABLE_DEFAULT: This arrangement is currently unavailable for your selected booking time.
BOOKING_ARRANGEMENTS_CUTOFF_REMOVED: One or more arrangements were removed because the order-before cutoff has passed.
BOOKING_MAINTENANCE_BODY: Online booking is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact us if you need help.
BOOKING_STEP_DRINKS_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load drinks. Please try again.
BOOKING_DRINKS_SELECT_X_DRINKS: Select {count} drinks in the list below.
BOOKING_DRINKS_NO_DRINKS_DESCRIPTION: There are no drinks available for this location at the moment.
BOOKING_DRINKS_NO_REQUIREMENT_DESCRIPTIO: Your selected arrangements do not require drinks.
BOOKING_EXTRAS_NO_EXTRAS_DESCRIPTION: There are no extras available for this location at the moment.
BOOKING_EXTRAS_FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load extras. Please try again.
BOOKING_EXTRAS_DISH_UNAVAILABLE_DEFAULT: This extra dish is currently unavailable for your selected booking time.
BOOKING_EXTRAS_DISH_CUTOFF_REMOVED: One or more extra dishes were removed because the order-before cutoff has passed.
USER_PROFILE_SECTION_DESCRIPTION: Identity and access for this user: name, login email, date of birth, assigned role, and whether the account is active.
USER_CONTACT_SECTION_DESCRIPTION: How to reach this user: phone and postal address details used for correspondence or internal records.
BOOKING_CART_NO_ADDITIONAL_ITEMS_HINT: Arrangements, drinks, and extras you add appear here.
BOOKING_PAYMENT_GUESTS_DESCRIPTION: You have selected {count} guests with a total base price of €{price}
BOOKING_PAYMENT_VOUCHER_HINT: Enter your voucher code below for a discount.
BOOKING_PAYMENT_VOUCHER_ERROR: Failed to apply voucher. Please try again.
BOOKING_COUPON_INACTIVE: This coupon is no longer active.
BOOKING_COUPON_NOT_YET_VALID: This coupon is not yet valid.
BOOKING_COUPON_MAX_USES: This coupon has reached its maximum uses.
BOOKING_COUPON_MIN_ORDER: Minimum order amount for this coupon is {amount}.
BOOKING_PAYMENT_TERMS_1: I have read and agree to the
BOOKING_PAYMENT_TERMS_2: I understand that I must arrive at least {minutes} minutes before my booking starts.
BOOKING_ORDER_OVERVIEW_ERROR: Failed to load order overview. The link may be invalid or expired.
SKILL_DETAIL_PREVIEW_DESCRIPTION: Live preview of how this skill appears on employee schedules and lists.
SKILL_DETAIL_PREVIEW_CAPTION: Abbreviation is shown when set; otherwise the skill name is used.
SKILL_DETAIL_SECTION_IDENTITY_DESCRIPTIO: Active status, name, short code, and category for HR pickers and scheduling.
SKILL_ACTIVE_HINT: When inactive, this skill is hidden from employee skill pickers and scheduling filters. Existing links on employees are kept.
SKILL_DETAIL_SECTION_DESCRIPTION_DESCRIP: Optional context for assessors and planners (not shown on compact labels).
SKILL_DETAIL_SECTION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION: Inactive skills stay in the catalog but are hidden from employee pickers and quick filters.
SKILL_DETAIL_SECTION_LABEL_COLORS_DESCRI: Customize background, text, and border colors so HR can spot skills at a glance.
SKILL_DETAIL_HELP_INTRO: Skills link to employees and appear as colored labels in planning views. A little setup here saves time later.
SKILL_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_CODE: Use a short code (e.g. LEAD, GAS) for compact schedule views.
SKILL_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_COLORS: Pick contrasting label colors so badges stay readable on screen and in print.
SKILL_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_CATEGORY: Category groups skills in employee pickers (Technical, Soft skills, Domain, Safety).
SKILL_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_ACTIVE: Deactivate instead of deleting when a skill is retired but still referenced historically.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_PREVIEW_DESCRIPTION: Live preview of how this certificate appears on employee profiles and pickers.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_PREVIEW_CAPTION: The abbreviation is shown when set; otherwise the certificate name.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_SECTION_IDENTITY_DESC: Active status, name, abbreviation, category, and whether employee links need an expiry date.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_SECTION_DESCRIPTION_D: Optional notes for HR and compliance (not shown on compact labels).
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_SECTION_LABEL_COLORS_: Adjust background, text, and border colors so HR can recognize certificates at a glance.
CERTIFICATE_ACTIVE_HINT: When inactive, this certificate is hidden in pickers and planning filters. Existing employee links are kept.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_HELP_INTRO: Certificates linked to employees support compliance tracking. Good setup here saves time when assigning qualifications.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_CODE: Use a short code (e.g. VCA, SCIOS) for compact chips in employee views.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_COLORS: Pick contrasting colors so labels stay readable on screen and in print.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_CATEGORY: Category groups certificates in pickers (Safety, Technical, Compliance).
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_EXPIRY: When expiry is required, employee certificate records must include issue and expiry dates.
CERTIFICATE_DETAIL_HELP_TIP_ACTIVE: Deactivate instead of deleting if a certificate is outdated but still needed historically.
BOOKING_PAYMENT_TERMS_INFO: Terms and conditions will be displayed here
BOOKING_PAYMENT_TERMS_NOT_ACCEPTED: Please accept the terms and conditions to proceed.
BOOKING_PAYMENT_HOLD_MISSING: No active hold found. Please select a date and time slot again.
BOOKING_PAYMENT_RESERVATION_ERROR: Failed to create reservation. Please try again.
BOOKING_CUSTOMER_EMAIL_PHONE_REQUIRED: Email and phone number are required.
BOOKING_CUSTOMER_FIELDS_REQUIRED: Please fill in all required fields: {fields}
LOCATION_SETTINGS_COUNTRY_DESC: Select the country for this location
LOCATION_SETTINGS_REGION_DESC: Select the region for this location
LOCATION_SETTINGS_REDIRECT_URL_DESC: Redirect URL back to the main website
LOCATION_SETTINGS_TERMS_AND_AGREEMENT_UR: URL to the terms and conditions page
LOCATION_SETTINGS_CUSTOMER_DETAILS_DESC: Whether customer details are required for bookings
LOCATION_SETTINGS_CHILDREN_PRICE_DESC: Amount charged per child on top of the adult pricing tier for the boat booking
LOCATION_SETTINGS_PAYMENT_PROVIDER_DESC: Select the payment provider for this location
LOCATION_SETTINGS_DEPOSIT_ENABLED_DESC: Enable or disable a booking deposit for this location
LOCATION_SETTINGS_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_DESC: Fixed deposit amount to charge for each booking
BOOKING_ORDER_PAYMENT_SUBTITLE_UNPAID: Please complete payment to confirm your reservation.
BOOKING_ORDER_PAYMENT_SUBTITLE_PENDING: We are waiting for payment confirmation.
BOOKING_ORDER_PAYMENT_SUBTITLE_PAID: Your reservation payment has been completed.
BOOKING_ORDER_PAYMENT_ERROR: Unable to start payment for this reservation.
PAYMENTS_CHARGEBACK_DEPOSIT_ONLY: Chargeback can only be applied to deposit payments in this view.
PAYMENTS_CHARGEBACK_HELP_TEXT: Set how much of the deposit to retain. The remainder will be refunded.
PAYMENTS_CHARGEBACK_NOTHING_LEFT: No refundable amount remains for this payment.
